sizing_rule.note: Position sizing for options scales inversely to volatility and adjusts for time decay using formula U*EXP(X*(V*T^(1/2))). Account for probability of underlying reaching strike using option pricing models. Author silent on optimal_f, Kelly fraction, and max drawdown tolerance thresholds.

source_rule_text: Position sizing for options should account for time to expiration (T) and probability of underlying reaching strike price, calculated using option pricing models with volatility adjustment.
